info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) API
info.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) simplifies deploying a managed Kubernetes cluster in Azure by offloading the operational overhead to Azure. As a hosted Kubernetes service, Azure handles critical tasks like health monitoring and maintenance. The REST API provides operations for managing AKS clusters, agent pools (node pools), maintenance configurations, and managed cluster snapshots, enabling developers to automate Kubernetes infrastructure management.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure Support
 Email: azuresupport@microsoft.com

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the target subscription.

request.description: Gets a list of managed clusters in the specified subscription.

response.name: Successfully returned the list of managed clusters.
